executive_summary.bottom_line: FOMC held 11-1 with 2026 cut probability collapsing from 18% to 3%, even as the 30yr mortgage drifted down 16 bps to 6.30% — Factor 1 actually weakened on a forward-looking basis despite the spot-rate move.
executive_summary.coiled_spring_state: Mechanically loosened (rates -16 bps WoW, ~95.1% of mortgages still locked below current), but no scenario-grid threshold crossed; nearest unlock at 6.25% would release ~5.4M owners and add ~1.5M SAAR.
executive_summary.whats_new: RE/MAX agreed to be acquired by Real Brokerage on April 27, driving RMAX +63% on the week — explains the headline mover with no read-across to the broader thesis.

factor_scorecard.name: rate_lockin
factor_scorecard.signal: 30yr -16 bps WoW; FOMC hold + Powell exit + 2026 cut odds collapse from 18% to 3%

factor_scorecard.name: reit_absorption
factor_scorecard.signal: No new SFR REIT 10-Q this week; INVH/AMH last filings remain February 2026

factor_scorecard.name: demographics_ceiling
factor_scorecard.signal: NAR pending sales -1.1% YoY despite spring; FHFA HPI Mountain -1.1% MoM

factor_scorecard.name: rent_own_spread
factor_scorecard.signal: No fresh CPI shelter print; FHFA HPI +1.7% YoY (slowing pace)

macro_deltas_material.comment: Builder activity firming despite cancel pressure

stock_signals.cause: Real Brokerage acquisition announced April 27; Zelman upgrade same day
stock_signals.thesis_read: Idiosyncratic M&A; no thesis read-across. Insider Adam Peterson sold ~$11.6M into the spike on April 29.

stock_signals.cause: 8-K April 30 with Items 1.01, 1.02, 2.03 (debt agreement events); -8.7% on April 29
stock_signals.thesis_read: Tier-1 long-thesis name showing balance-sheet stress is dissonant with thesis. Refi-volume share could shift to RKT/COOP/UWMC.
Stress signal at affordability ceiling. First-time-buyer / FHA cohort fracturing at contract-to-close stage.

homebuilder_update.highlight: Cancellation rate 45.6% — far above Tier-1 peer cohort median (BZH 13.5%, NVR 14.0%, MHO 8.0%, TMHC 10.0%, DFH 7.5%). Suggests rate-sensitive entry-level cohort fracturing at contract-to-close stage.
homebuilder_update.cohort_pattern: Across nine Tier-1 builders that printed in trailing 2 weeks: net orders +14% to +37% QoQ, closings -17% to -34% QoQ. Backlog +20% to +60%.

policy_events.event: FHFA + HUD authorize VantageScore 4.0 and FICO 10T
FOMC held 3.50-3.75% (vote 11-1, Miran dissent for cut); 2026 cut probability fell to ~3%
NAR Pending Home Sales March +1.5% MoM, -1.1% YoY
FHFA HPI February +1.7% YoY (slowest pace in cycle); Mountain -1.1% MoM

key_risk.summary: FOMC's collapsing 2026 cut path (probability now ~3% vs 18% prior week) extends the path-to-5.5% trigger from late-2026 baseline to mid-2027 or later, materially lengthening the duration of capital tied up before unlock realizes. Powell exits in June, Warsh succeeds. If oil sustains above $80, timing slips another 6-12 months.
key_risk.threshold: If May/June FOMC speakers reaffirm hold-through-year-end stance, downgrade thesis time horizon by 6 months in next quarterly review.

underappreciated_catalyst.summary: FHFA/HUD VantageScore 4.0 + FICO 10T approval is being framed as a credit-scoring story, but the second-order effect is on Factor 4 (demographics ceiling). Rent-payment-history scoring expands qualified-borrower pool by an estimated 4-7M consumers — not priced into JCHS's already-reduced 8.6M household-growth forecast.
underappreciated_catalyst.evidence: FHFA reaffirmed tri-merge requirement; Pulte stated 'stay tuned' on LLPA adjustments. Watch summer 2026 historical FICO 10T data for loss-rate parity, which would be the trigger for material pricing change.

what_would_change_my_mind: April CPI shelter print (May 14) <0.25% MoM would strengthen Factor 5 enough to offset this week's Factor 1 weakening
MBA applications May 7 print >+5% would suggest the +7.9% on April 22 was a trend, not noise — Factor 1 leading indicator turning despite spot rates
Any SFR REIT (INVH/AMH) 10-Q with >5% net dispositions when filings land mid-May would give Factor 2 its first directional signal in 10+ weeks

data_integrity_flags.note: value 3,980 SAAR with days_stale=61; spec threshold is days_stale>31. Display-only this run.
period_end_date is null for all REITs; only filing_date populated. Cannot compute QoQ home-count deltas without prior-period reference.
